arts.ttl: Messi "wasn't happy on a daily basis" at PSG
arts.sum: Eight-time Men's Ballon d'Or winner Lionel Messi says he "didn't enjoy" playing for French club Paris St-Germain during his two-year spell and was "unhappy."

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi reveals he had ‘hard time adapting’ to life at Paris St Germain
arts.sum: The 37-year-old joined Major League Soccer club Inter Miami from PSG in July 2023 after a troubled period in the French capital.

arts.ttl: Fabián Ruiz says PSG ‘more united’ following Kylian Mbappé, Lionel Messi, and Neymar’s exit
arts.sum: In an interview with Movistar, Fabián Ruiz (28) reflected on the impact that the departures of Paris Saint-Germain’s former superstars Lionel Messi, Neymar, and Kylian Mbappé have had on the…

arts.ttl: Ligue 1 Predictions | Round 24: PSG look to extend their unbeaten run against Lille
arts.sum: Ligue 1 Predictions, Round 24 GFFN editor-in-chief Luke Entwistle and GFFN’s Raphaël Jucobin face off in our Ligue 1 predictions competition. It’s three points for a correct score, two points for a correct score difference, and one…

arts.ttl: Neymar makes outlandish claim on how he 'taught' Lionel Messi - 'Are you crazy?'
arts.sum: Neymar and Lionel Messi are close friends after being team-mates for many years and the Brazilian has now taken some credit for the Argentine's superb penalty-taking technique in his career

arts.ttl: Saudi Arabia deny making lucrative offer for PSG’s Luís Campos
arts.sum: In an official communiqué, the Saudi Arabian Football Federation have denied reports of a lucrative offer for Paris Saint-Germain sporting director Luís Campos. According to Le Parisien, the Portuguese sporting director received…

arts.ttl: PSG Willing to Trigger €45M Release Clause for Aston Villa, Man Utd Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are no strangers to attracting top Portuguese talent to the French capital, and this summer, the Ligue 1 leaders may look to repeat their success. With strong ties to Portugal through sporting advisor Luis Campos, PSG has previously signed players like Vitinha, João Neves, and Gonçalo Ramos.
